---
title: "Core Competencies Catalog"
listing:
  contents: content
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
page-layout: full
---

<img src="content/images/logo_lwg-long.png" alt="Logo for LegacyWorks Group" width="30%" align="right"/>

Use this page to search for which currently-available trainings leverage the selected Core Competencies.

<br>
